components.name: Mirewinder Parallel Biode
components.description:
Controls the electrical flow throughout the circuitry within robotic organisms.

Source: Dismantled from Mirewinder servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Mirewinder in Orb Vallis caves during any weather. Also drops from resource containers across the Orb Vallis.

components.name: Oxium
components.description:
Oxium is a rare lighter than air alloy of Orokin origin, used in certain Corpus Robotics.

Location: Venus, Jupiter, Mars, Neptune, Pluto, Eris, Europa, and Lua.

components.name: Star Amarast
components.description:
Polished and cut to perfection.

Blueprint sold by Smokefinger in Fortuna on Venus.

components.name: Thermal Sludge
components.description:
A by-product from the Weeping Towers terraforming processes.

Location: Orb Vallis on Venus
